promptSpecDrift.specValue: spec D3 + ADR-MOD-GRID-13-007: MergePriorityConfig 타입 추가 없음. 우선순위는 columns 배열 순서로 암시적 결정 (implicit priority). types.ts 수정 없음.
promptSpecDrift.resolution: spec applied — no mergePriority prop or MergePriorityConfig type added. Implicit priority via array order only. goals.json userJourneyStep 4 references an API that was explicitly rejected in spec D3 + ADR-007.

regressionVerification.g001StoriesPreserved: YES — MergeRowsBoolean (L67) and MergeRowsCompareFn (L117) unchanged. HierarchicalMerge added at L185.
regressionVerification.singleColumnDegeneration: VERIFIED — columns.length === 1: ancestorBoundary initialized to false at start of each row-transition loop. No left column exists, so ancestorBoundary never set to true. Only own compareFn evaluated. Output = {0_dept:2, 1_dept:0, 2_dept:1} for rows=[A,A,B] — bit-identical to G-001. ADR-MOD-GRID-13-008 + JSDoc @remarks document this invariant.

feedback.promptStoryNameDrift: Prompt references G-001 stories as 'BasicMerge / CustomCompareFn'. Actual G-001 file has MergeRowsBoolean and MergeRowsCompareFn. Structural reference (not value drift) — preserved real names, 1-line note only.
feedback.promptBranchDrift: Prompt says 'mergeColumns.length == 1 → G-001 동작 그대로 (회귀 보존)' with implied explicit branch. Spec D2 + ADR-MOD-GRID-13-006 resolve this via unified algorithm (mathematical degeneration, no explicit branch). Spec applied.
feedback.goalsJsonImplementFiles: goals.json G-002 implementFiles lists only 2 files (computeMergeSpans.ts + types.ts). Spec Section 7 is authoritative: 3 files (computeMergeSpans.ts + MergingGrid.stories.tsx + decisions.md). Spec applied. types.ts not modified per spec D3.
feedback.ec002MiddleColumnHandling: EC-002 (mergeRows-unset column in middle of array) correctly handled: `if (fn === null) continue;` skips iteration without resetting ancestorBoundary — boundary propagates across the gap.
feedback.c31WiringAudit: MergingGrid.tsx L79: computeMergeSpans(rows.map((r) => r.original), mergeColumns) — unchanged from G-001. No wiring changes needed. New hierarchical algorithm is transparent drop-in.
feedback.buildSizes: dist/index.mjs 3.25 KB (+0.39 KB vs G-001 2.86 KB). Expected per spec Section 9: '+2 KB' estimate was generous — actual delta is ~0.4 KB.
